title: STEBRUAM Delta-Triangle Sanding Sheets, Sanding discs 50 Pieces Detail Sander Pads 6 Holes Triangle Sandpaper 40 Grits Pads 93 x 93 x 93 mm Sander Sheets
features: 【Alumina Delta Sanding Sheets】Strong water resistance and can be used in wet and dry environments,The newly developed adhesive improves the abrasion resistance and softness of delta sander pads and has high polishing efficiency,Good finish and long service life
【Size】93 * 93 * 93mm-3.6*3.6*3.6 Inch,with 6 holes for dust extraction-prevent obstructions-Ideal for DELTA Sanders
【Backing】Hook and Loop Sanding Sheets,easy and quick to stick-sturdy-durable and practical,Good Choice for Sanding and Polishing
【50 Pieces Sand Paper Pad Mixpack 】Each package contains 50 pieces of triangular sanding pads,40 Grits,satisfy almost all your general polishing requirements
【Wide Application】Suitable for grinding-polishing and derusting metal and non-metal-leather-wood-plastic-stone-rubber-glass and other materials etc,multi tool sanding pads-sandpaper for sander
description: Product Description STEBRUAM Detail Sander Sandpaper Sanding Paper Hook and Loop Assorted 10 x Grits 60/80/120/180/240/320/400 Grits, 6 Holes. 93mm Sanding Pads Sandpapaer Feature: 6 holes design for dust removal, to prevent clogging. High Quality alumina abrasive, sturdy and durable. Detail sander pads, hook and loop backing for quick fitting. Sanding Discs Pads Wear resistance,antistatic and anti clogging. Suitable for grinding and throwing furniture, wood products, metals, automobiles, etc. Fit for hand sanders delta sanding pads. Granularity Reference: 60 - 120：Rough grinding series: used to polish hard, rough materials, such as metal, wood products and so on. 150 - 320：Commonly used granularity: used for regrinding of rough grinding. This type of granularity can basically meet the requirements that are not very high but can be formed. 400： Fine grinding series: used for mahogany furniture, automobiles, amber, antique and other high-grade grinding. STEBRUAM triangle sanding pad Use and Package Apply to metal and non-metal, wood, rubber, leather, plastic, stone, glass and other materials grinding, polishing and so on Triangle Sanding Pad Specifications Material Abrasive: aluminium oxide Size: 93 * 93 * 93mm Pre-punched with 6 holes Back technique: hook and loop Backing Technology The triangle sanding pads come in hook and loop back which is easy and quick to stick on and remove from the sander triangle design sanding pads helps reach tight corners efficient for sanding and polishing wet and dry sandpaper Mouse Sanding Sheets Mouse Sandpaper 8 Hole Disc Sandpaper 8 Hole Disc Sandpaper 8 Hole Disc Sandpaper Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,494 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,779 4.5 out of 5 stars 2,779 4.6 out of 5 stars 4,315 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,313 4.6 out of 5 stars 2,313 Price — no data £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 Size 9 x 3.6 INCH 140MM*95MM 165MM*95MM 125MM*125MM 125MM*125MM 125MM*125MM Quantity 42 PCS 88 PCS 70 PCS 105 PCS 110 PCS 100 PCS Material silicon carbide Alumina Alumina Alumina Alumina Alumina Grit 120~3000Grits 40~800Grits 60~400Grits 40~600Grits 60~800Grits 60~800Grits Color Black Red Red Red Yellow Yellow
